welcome.title: Welcome to the Fernández Training Center Foundation
welcome.lema: We educate people, we transform communities

testimonio.titulo: We educate people, we transform communities
testimonio.texto: The Fernández Training Center Foundation seeks to provide young people in the region with the knowledge and training necessary for their personal and professional development. It has also become a social meeting space between the culture of northern Argentina and German culture, enriching both by offering their members a broader understanding of their respective realities.

tarjeta1.texto: Educating young people, promoting educational projects, and strengthening the Fernández community.

infomiel.texto: We offer 100% pure honey from Santiago del Estero, produced from carob trees, chañar, quebracho, and wildflowers. Our honey is backed by numerous laboratory studies and quality tests conducted in both Argentina and Germany.

footer.redes: Training and commitment to the community, also on social media
